approaches.title: Monotonic Stack
approaches.summary: Uses a stack to keep track of indices of temperatures in decreasing order. For each temperature, pops indices from the stack until a warmer temperature is found

revisions.commitComment: use iterator to reduce bounds checks
revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 739: use iterator to reduce bounds checks
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Optimized by using iterator to reduce bounds checks
